rationale: Iran peace signals could modestly ease energy costs for Portugal; otherwise this cycle is largely irrelevant to a Portuguese resident's daily life.

top_events.title: Iran signals Hormuz reopening if deal reached
top_events.summary: A potential Iran deal and Hormuz reopening could lower global oil and gas prices, offering indirect relief to Portuguese households and the tourism-dependent economy.

top_events.title: UAE to unlock frozen Iranian funds amid US ceasefire push
top_events.summary: Progress toward Iran ceasefire reduces global energy market uncertainty, with modest positive spillover for EU energy prices affecting Portugal.

top_events.title: Extreme rain kills rare great apes in Indonesia
top_events.summary: A distant environmental event with no direct impact on Portugal; noted only as a climate signal with no Iberian relevance this cycle.
